title: deringa thomasii
side_effects: Deringa thomasii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of the deringa thomasii plant may cause liver damage and kidney dysfunction due to its high toxicity levels. Furthermore, it can interact with other medications, resulting in adverse reactions and reducing their effectiveness.
